rationale: The archetype's hook is built around a puzzle/parking-style "blocked path" fail — a static, tap-to-solve mechanic that has no analog in Crowd City's continuous swarm-and-consume loop, so adapting it would feel deceptive (classic fake-ad risk). Visually the muted bus/grid palette and hand-cursor framing clash with Crowd City's bright primary-color crowd swarms and free-roam city camera. Audience overlap exists at the broad hypercasual level, but mechanic and visual friction are severe — do not greenlight unless reworked into a "crowd gets stuck/outnumbered, can you win?" fail scenario using actual gameplay footage.
